generated_oml:
// C1: System Under Study
instance FirstAxisMabiMax100Robot : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot focusing on motor, gearbox, and cycloidal gear components for improving motion control accuracy through friction modeling."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical component of the robot's first axis responsible for power transmission to the gearbox system."
]

instance GearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component interfacing with the motor to transmit rotational motion with reduced backlash."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PrimaryMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft for real-time rotational position measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance SecondaryGearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox to measure output position and reduce measurement uncertainty."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleData
]

instance SiemensSinumerikController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing access to motor current and derived torque calculations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryMotorEncoder, SiemensSinumerikController
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryGearboxEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSinumerikController
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentData
]

instance FrictionLossData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueData
]

// C5: Data Traces
instance MeasuredMotorCurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measurements of motor current (I_M) from physical sensors via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngleTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measurements of output angle from secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance DerivedTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque values (τ_M) derived from motor current and robot dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance FrictionModelOutputTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-affected outputs generated by MATLAB Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkModel
]

instance FrictionlessOutputTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-free outputs for comparison against friction-affected outputs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkModel
]

// C6: Models/Data Enablers
instance SysMLBlockDefinition : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool (SysML) used for creating structural models of motor/gearbox components."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for dynamic modeling of friction effects and system behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for real-time data streaming between physical sensors and digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Industry Foundation Classes (IEC 62443-501) standard for linking physical and digital models via AAS."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelLinkingService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard visualization platform for real-time monitoring and decision support."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C7: Digital Twin Models
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the physical structure of motor and gearbox components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLBlockDefinition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink models implementing Coulomb-Viscous-Stribeck friction laws for dynamic behavior simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance RobotDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model for torque/velocity calculations based on manufacturer-provided robot parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkModel
]

// C8: Digital Twin Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting and analyzing friction loss (static, kinetic, viscous) using both white-box and black-box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance RealTimeDataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for streaming live measurements (motor current, output angle) and derived data via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveMeasurementInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive dashboards for monitoring friction-related deviations and planning adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationMonitoringInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustmentPlanningAction
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous service for integrating new friction models and sensor data for real-time model adaptation."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicAdaptationAction
]

// C9: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction loss affecting robot accuracy, with analysis of its impact on motion performance."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic parameter updates for friction models to optimize control algorithms based on real-time measurements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LiveMeasurementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of physical sensor data (motor current, output angle) for immediate digital twin synchronization."
]

instance DeviationMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of operational deviations from expected behavior in the dashboard for operator awareness."
]

instance DynamicAdaptationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous integration of new friction models and sensor data to dynamically refine the digital twin during operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Digital Twin Environment
instance FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorComponent
    base:contains GearboxComponent
    base:contains StructuralModel
    base:contains FrictionModel
    base:contains RobotDynamicsModel
    base:contains MeasuredMotorCurrentTrace
    base:contains MeasuredOutputAngleTrace
    base:contains DerivedTorqueTrace
    base:contains FrictionModelOutputTrace
    base:contains FrictionlessOutputTrace
]

// Additional required instances for proper service relationships
instance StructuralModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for structural model analysis and validation."
]

instance ModelLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for linking physical components to digital models via AAS."
]

instance AdjustmentPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Planning and execution of adjustments based on friction-related deviations."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to include:
  - **Friction models** (white-box/black-box) dynamically updated in the digital shadow to adjust control algorithms for improved accuracy.
  - **Simulation outputs** (e.g., simulated motor/gearbox outputs) used for comparison with real-time measurements."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on a **real-time or near-real-time scale**:
  - Data streams (e.g., MQTT) are processed continuously during robot operation.
  - Model updates and friction identifications occur in **real-time or sub-second intervals** to maintain accuracy."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - A **centralized digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot.
  - Integration of **live sensor data**, **engineering models**, and **simulation models** into a unified system.
  - Orchestration via **SysML models** and **MQTT data streams** for seamless data flow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates primarily during the **operated stage** of the robot’s lifecycle:
  - Focuses on **as-operated** conditions (real-time friction modeling during use).
  - Supports **continuous improvement** of control accuracy during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Traceability** via SysML and AAS for linking data to physical components.
  - **Uncertainty quantification** in friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) to account for wear/temperature effects.
  - **Validation** via comparison of simulated vs. measured data (e.g., torque/velocity deviations)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data transmission between sensors and digital shadow.
  - **SysML models** for structural and behavioral representation.
  - **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller** as the interface for robot control data."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed, but inferred as:
  - Likely deployed on a **local server or cloud infrastructure** (e.g., RWTH Aachen University’s IoP platform).
  - Hosted alongside the robot’s CNC controller for real-time processing."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed, but implied to include:
  - Integration with **robot control systems** (SINUMERIK 840D) for real-time adjustments.
  - Potential future integration with **other digital twins** or enterprise systems for broader manufacturing data."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed, but implied:
  - Data ownership likely rests with the **robot manufacturer (MABI Robotic AG)** or **research institution (RWTH Aachen)**.
  - Privacy considerations may apply to **sensor data** (e.g., motor currents) during operation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standards followed include:
  - **SysML** for system modeling.
  - **MQTT** for real-time data communication.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for digital twin interoperability.
  - **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** methodologies (e.g., RFLP, OOSEM)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Real-time monitoring** of friction-related deviations to prevent errors.
  - **Encrypted data transmission** (via MQTT) to protect sensor data.
  - **Human-in-the-loop** via visualization dashboards for safe operation."
]
